Package com.dtwthalion.mpgo

Class Enums

java.lang.Object
com.dtwthalion.mpgo.Enums
public final class Enums extends Object
Enumerations mirroring the ObjC MPGOEnums.h integer values.

Declaration order in each enum matches the ObjC NS_ENUM integer values so that Enum.ordinal() is a direct pass-through of the on-disk attribute. No translation table can go stale.

API status: Stable.

Cross-language equivalents: Objective-C MPGOEnums.h, Python mpeg_o.enums.

Since:
0.6
